content:
{
  "market_assessment": {

Positive global cues from US (S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%) supportive. Book is well-positioned with 65% deployed and most positions in green.",

      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },

      "new_target": 1110.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.4%, well above breakeven trail trigger. Current SL 1025.86 is below day low 1043.50; tightening to 1030 (still ~1.6% below CMP 1047, preserving 1% trail-gap discipline). Q4 strong, ICICI Sec TP 1350. Hold target."
    },
    {

      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

      "product": "CNC",

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%. Stored SL 1710 already at breakeven+. CMP 1729.50, gap to SL ~1.1%. No-op MODIFY check: keeping at 1710 — SL already at breakeven. Actually emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,

    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

    {

      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

    {

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",

      "product": "MIS",

      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY LIMIT 133.50 placed 450 minutes ago, still unfilled. No new order. Will let it expire at MIS cutoff if not filled — order hygiene rule prevents stacking duplicates."
    }

  "position_actions": [

      "current_action": "HOLD",

    },
    {

    },

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },

      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,

    },

      "current_action": "HOLD",

  "watchlist_notes": "BIOCON: Q4 results May 7 (TOMORROW) — binary event, NO new entry. CAMS/WOCKPHARMA/SRF/PNB/AJANTPHARM: skip new entries this tick — book already at 65% deployed with overlapping themes (Defence: HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH = 3 names, FMCG: MARICO, HFC: PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+BANDHANBNK = financials cluster). Adding more would breach cluster discipline. LINDEINDIA RPT governance overhang noted — skip per Rule 13.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-deployed at 65% with 12 CNC positions, most green. Cluster check: Defence/Capital Goods cluster = HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH (3 names). Financials cluster = PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + BANDHANBNK (3 names). Both clusters at limit — no new admissions allowed today per Rule 10 hard limit. Today's tick focused on trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING, HAL, COFORGE) and holding remaining positions through breakouts. NO new entries justified given cluster saturation and binary event proximity (BIOCON Q4 tomorrow). Cash ~35% provides dry powder for post-event setups."
